message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "QuerySet" as QuerySet
participant "QueryParser" as QueryParser
participant "Tokenizer" as Tokenizer
participant "Query" as Query
participant "QueryComponent" as QueryComponent

User -> QuerySet: 1 QuerySet()
User -> QuerySet: 2 add("longitude", "*/CLON")
QuerySet -> QueryParser: 3 parse(queryString)
activate QueryParser
QueryParser -> Tokenizer: 4 tokenize(queryString)
activate Tokenizer
Tokenizer --> QueryParser: 5 tokens
deactivate Tokenizer

loop [all sub-queries]
    QueryParser -> Query: 6 Query()
    activate Query
    
    loop [all components]
        QueryParser -> QueryComponent: 7 QueryComponent()
        activate QueryComponent
        QueryParser -> Query: 8 push_back(component)
        deactivate QueryComponent
    end
    
    deactivate Query
end

QueryParser --> QuerySet: 9 queries
deactivate QueryParser

@enduml
```
